gate_name: Model Risk Governance + Decision Accountability Pack
model_algorithm: XGBoost (gradient boosted trees) + Platt sigmoid calibration
dataset: UCI ML Repository — Default of Credit Card Clients (Taiwan, 2005)
launch_status_reason: Portfolio research project. No real applicants. No regulatory review. No IMV sign-off. No adverse action infrastructure. Taiwan Default is 2005 vintage — 19+ year gap to any current deployment. See G8_GOVERNANCE_SIGNOFF_PACKET.md Section 3 for full pre-launch requirement list.

approval_checklist_summary.risk_fairness_evidence: 3/6 COMPLETE (Taiwan Default fairness audit deferred to G9)

pre_launch_gaps: L1: Independent Model Validation (IMV) — not completed
L2: Fair-lending assessment at production thresholds — Taiwan Default only; fairness audit at 0.20/0.40 not done
L3: Adverse action code assignment — not implemented
L4: Data lineage and access controls — not applicable to public research dataset
L5: Model validated on recent vintage — 2005 dataset; 19+ year gap
L6: Stress testing under adverse scenarios — not implemented
L7: FastAPI serving with training-serving parity — deferred to G9
L8: Retraining pipeline tested end-to-end — not implemented
L9: Rollback procedure tested — defined but not tested
L10: Compliance officer sign-off — not assigned; out of scope
model_freeze_conditions: Approval rate change > 15 pp in 30 days
Data pipeline FAIL in feature production

mandatory_escalation_conditions: LIMIT_BAL > NT$800,000 AND PD in review zone
Any monitor in ALERT during review
Reviewer uncertainty — cannot justify with standard reason codes
prohibited_reviewer_behaviours: Use SEX as a decision factor
Submit override with reason code RC-99 only (no narrative)
Approve without confirming payment history reviewed
human_review_rules.override_logging: Tamper-evident hash-chained JSONL; all fields mandatory

taiwan_real_data_lane.gap: SEX/EDUCATION/MARRIAGE approval rates at theta_approve=0.20 and theta_reject=0.40 not evaluated
taiwan_real_data_lane.note: Male default rate 24.17%; female default rate 20.78%. Identical thresholds will produce different group-level outcomes. Whether this constitutes disparate impact is unknown.

forbidden_claims: Real credit decisions have been made using this model
This model complies with ECOA, FCRA, RBI, or any financial regulation
This model is SR 26-2 compliant or certified
Adverse action notices are generated by this system
This model is fair across demographic groups (Taiwan fairness audit not completed)
The C_bad=10 / C_reject=1 cost matrix reflects real lender economics
This model outperforms RiskFrame's Home Credit model (different datasets)
LightGBM is inferior to XGBoost in general (only tested uncalibrated vs calibrated champion)
safe_target_claim: PulseGuard adds a model-risk governance packet around the calibrated Taiwan Default champion, including model card, approval checklist, monitoring triggers, human review policy, override logging, and explicit non-production claim boundaries.
g9_required_deliverables: Fair-lending assessment on Taiwan Default at thresholds 0.20/0.40 (SEX/EDUCATION/MARRIAGE)
Calibrated LightGBM vs calibrated XGBoost champion/challenger comparison
SHAP-based adverse action reason code assignment
Optuna HPO with calibration gate documented
FastAPI serving with training-serving parity check
Reject inference study or documented justification for omission
Delayed label validation pipeline on Taiwan Default
